header.headline: Kernel Registry Flow
header.subtitle: Bridge the older registry flow asset into the broader architecture-map surface instead of leaving it legacy-only.

ingest.title: Operator Intent
ingest.body: Start from the high-level operator request that needs a kernel mapping.

shape.title: Registry Lookup
shape.body: The registry resolves intent into concrete kernel bindings and fallback paths.

lower.title: Binding Chain
lower.body: Bind the chosen kernel to its runtime-facing dimensions and artifacts.

runtime.title: Runtime Path
runtime.body: The runtime consumes the chosen kernel chain as one deterministic flow.

outcome.title: Registry Visibility
outcome.body: A good map keeps registry choice, binding, and runtime output in one line of sight.

footer.note: Legacy architecture assets should be explicit seeds in the full gen1 mix, not only inherited history.
